description: Evaluates security architecture management maturity—service governance, KPIs/KRIs, network and application segmentation, encryption, network resiliency, design reviews, secure API communications, network security controls, cloud migration, and architecture management office operations.

capabilities.name: Service exists and is in good condition
capabilities.description: A security architecture management service exists, is scoped appropriately, and is reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy.
evaluation_focus: Enterprise architecture management service exists
Regular service efficacy review

capabilities.name: KPIs/KRIs
capabilities.description: Architecture management KPIs and KRIs—including segmentation coverage, design review completion, and encryption compliance—are documented and reviewed at least quarterly.
evaluation_focus: Documented KPIs and KRIs for architecture management
Regular KPI/KRI review
Segmentation coverage and design review metrics
Encryption and API security compliance metrics

capabilities.name: Network and application segmentation
capabilities.description: Network and application segmentation follow documented strategies or industry standards, are deployed enterprise-wide with automation support, physically separate staging and production, and are reviewed at least quarterly.
evaluation_focus: Segmentation strategy or industry standards
Enterprise-wide network and application segmentation deployment
Automated or manual segmentation by functional requirement
Regular segmentation review for security enhancement
Physical separation of staging, development, and deployment segments

capabilities.name: Network encryption and cryptographic agility
capabilities.description: The enterprise encrypts data in motion between segments enterprise-wide and maintains cryptographic agility.
evaluation_focus: Data in motion encryption enterprise-wide
Cryptographic agility

capabilities.name: Network resiliency and assurance
capabilities.description: Network architecture provides active/active resiliency across availability zones, alternate paths for workloads, and single point of failure analysis.
evaluation_focus: Active/active network across availability zones
At least two availability zones
Alternate path failover for workloads
Single point of failure analysis

capabilities.name: Security design reviews
capabilities.description: A formalized documented process governs security architecture design reviews, including AI-era threat models and zero-trust principles, with quarterly review of the process.
evaluation_focus: Formalized documented design review process
AI-era and zero-trust considerations in design reviews
Regular design review process efficacy review

capabilities.name: Secure internal API communications
capabilities.description: Technology and deployment practices support secure API communications across functional segments, with monitoring and quarterly review.
evaluation_focus: Technology supporting secure API communications
Secure communications across functional segments and applications
Monitoring and review of inter-application communications

capabilities.name: Network security controls
capabilities.description: Function-based network security controls are deployed across enterprise functional segments and reviewed at least quarterly.
evaluation_focus: Function-based network security controls across segments
Regular network security control efficacy review

capabilities.name: Cloud adoption and migration
capabilities.description: The enterprise can securely migrate workloads from on-premises to cloud segments across all locations, with automation and quarterly process review.
evaluation_focus: Secure on-premises to cloud workload migration
Cloud migration across all enterprise locations
Automated cloud migration from on-premises segments
Regular cloud migration process review

capabilities.name: Architecture management office (AMO)
capabilities.description: A dedicated architecture management office team tracks architectural changes, measures threat risk including AI-era threats, and reviews relevant architectural upgrades.
evaluation_focus: Dedicated AMO team for architectural change management
Threat risk measurement and architectural upgrade review
AI-era threat awareness in architecture governance

evaluation.resiliency_weight_policy: Ask stakeholder for per-capability weights when adding a new evaluation service. This service uses weight 1 for all capabilities.
evaluation.pillar_policy: Some services may have no Technology capabilities; in those cases, do not compute or report a Technology pillar score.
